chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 438 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 22.05.2024 Mr. Abdul Shakoor Bullo, Advocate for petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A statement is filed on behalf of SHO, Police Station ‘C’ Section, Sukkur (respondent No.3), taken on record. Petitioner, confined in Darul Aman, Sukkur, sent there in terms of order dated 09.12.2023, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-V, Sukkur, where she had appeared and shown apprehension to her life from her parents, has been produced today by Darul Aman authorities. She submits that she had filed a Suit for dissolution of marriage on the ground of khula against her previous husband Imran Ali before learned Family Judge, Sukkur, which was ex parte decreed on 04.03.2024. When her parents came to know of it, they became annoyed and started threatening her; hence, she appeared before learned Additional Sessions Judge-V, Sukkur and requested for sending her to Darul Aman. She further submits that she wants to marry with one Sajjad out of her own freewill and does not want to live in Darul Aman anymore. The ex parte judgment dated 04.03.2024 shows that still period of iddat of petitioner of ninety has not expired, and is to expire on 03.06.2024. Therefore, after expiry of period of iddat, with her consent, In charge, Darul Aman, Sukkur shall make arrangements of her nikkah with said Sajjad in Darul Aman not later than ten days of expiry of iddat period.

The ex parte judgment dated 04.03.2024 shows that still period of iddat of petitioner of ninety has not expired, and is to expire on 03.06.2024. Therefore, after expiry of period of iddat, with her consent, In charge, Darul Aman, Sukkur shall make arrangements of her nikkah with said Sajjad in Darul Aman not later than ten days of expiry of iddat period. After her nikkah is performed, she shall be set at liberty to accompany her newly wedded husband. Petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
